[133:25]This is Charlie Kirk to Benjamin Netanyahu on May 2nd 2025 he writes

[133:32]One of my greatest joys as a Christian is advocating for Israel, and forming alliances with Jews in the fight to protect Judeo-Christian civilization.

[133:42]Most recently, I am proud to have taken over Ambassador Huckabee's show on TBN, where we continually support Israel and the Jewish people.

[133:53]Spreads into Western societies, it is critical that Jews and Christians stay united in the effort to contain and roll back radical Islam and Sharia law.

[134:03]I regret to report that anti-Israel and anti-Semitic trends are at record levels on social media.

[134:10]My team and I have spent months analyzing these trends and debating ideas that could help you and your country push back against these disturbing developments.

[134:19]Anti-Israel sentiment can undermine American support for Israel.

[134:24]Wouldn't want to do that.

[134:26]The purpose of this letter is to lay out our concerns and outline potential remedies.

[134:32]Everything written here is from a place of deep love for Israel and the Jewish people.

[134:38]I think it's important to be brutally honest with those you love.

[134:41]It's tough love.

[134:43]In my opinion, Israel is losing the information war and needs a communications intervention.

[134:49]I started to compose this letter to you on Easter.

[134:52]I should have been focused on my family, but I was getting barred with messages about the Israeli army,

[134:57]making it difficult for Christians to access church in Jerusalem on Easter.

[135:02]At the time, I did not see any official statements pushing back on this narrative.

[135:07]It was frustrating, because pro-Israel surrogates like me.

[135:12]Pro-Israel surrogate, by the way.

[135:15]should not be in charge of fact-checking every piece of anti-Israel misinformation that pours onto social media.

[135:23]And it wasn't just Easter.

[135:30]I often spend half my time on these campus tours defending Jews and Israel,

[135:35]which I'm proud to do because I love Israel and love the Jewish faith.
